prompt.content:
Please score all the open jobs using the attached scoring framework. State in the console the number of open jobs with a Weighted Criticality Score greater than 70 as of 2026/01/28?

Use the Greenhouse tool to extract the relevant data. Refer to the Scoring-Framework.docx and Job_Pipeline_Targets.csv in the filesystem for the scoring framework and pipeline target respectively. 

Please provide a full report of your analysis and actions in the console.
